message:
test: add 79 unit tests to analysis/diff.rs and analysis/drift.rs

diff.rs: 9→60 tests covering detect_changes, normalize_cycle, compare_cycles,
calculate_summary, snapshot_counts, average_map_value, format_string_set,
non_empty, into_option, option_len, SnapshotDiff methods, and status
transition stripping.

drift.rs: 7→35 tests covering signed_usize_delta, is_leap, days_to_date,
top_metric_items, severity_rank, check_metric_drift, compute_drift exit
codes, density/baseline edge cases, and save/load roundtrip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
